## Intent

What becomes sharper, faster, clearer, or more routeable?

## Repo fit

Why does this belong here and not in a neighboring repo?

## Field effect

How does this help one or more of:
- entry
- use
- reuse
- comparison
- experimentation
- watchability
- recurrence
- sponsorability

## Proof

What can be run, opened, or inspected right now?

## Boundary check

What does this explicitly not try to do?

## Risk check

Does this introduce any of the following?
- role confusion
- route clutter
- explanation before result
- genericization
- dead structure
- commerce before trust
